# mise

> Evidence-only regulatory & policy intelligence for banks.
> Ingest public law + internal controls, build a compliance graph, detect gaps/conflicts/staleness, answer audit questions with cited evidence. Open source (AGPL-3.0), single-tenant, self-hosted.

- [Home](https://mise.danny.vn/#/): Documentation hub for mise — regulatory intelligence for banks.

## Getting started

- [Overview](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/overview): What mise does — 5 corpora, compliance graph, 4 detectors, evidence-only Q&A.
- [Deploy](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/deploy): Local dev with Podman + VERTEX=fake, or production GKE deployment.
- [First corpus](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/first-corpus): Ingest Vietnamese banking law (vn-reg) — no credentials needed.
- [Graph & detectors](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/graph-detectors): Add internal docs, build the compliance graph, review proposed edges.
- [Audit Q&A](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/audit-qa): Ask audit questions — Claude agent answers with cited, grounded evidence via SSE.
- [Web UI](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/web-ui): Vue 3.5 SPA — graph explorer, review workbench, findings, Q&A chat.
- [Operations](https://mise.danny.vn/#/guides/operations): Monitoring, backup, upgrades, scaling, security operations.

## Design

- [Architecture](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/ARCHITECTURE): Read/write planes, Go serving, Claude reasoning, Gemini ingest, AlloyDB Omni.
- [Data model](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/DATA-MODEL): Corpus schemas, graph schema, edge types, findings, notifications.
- [AI governance](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/AI-GOVERNANCE): Model gates, agent guardrails, grounding checks, audit trail.
- [Data governance](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/DATA-GOVERNANCE): Access tiers, RLS, HITL, data audit, egress control.
- [UI design](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/UI-DESIGN): Screen designs, component library, interaction patterns.
- [API contract](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/API-CONTRACT): REST + MCP + SSE API surfaces, generated OpenAPI contract.

## Engineering

- [Toolchain](https://mise.danny.vn/#/design/engineering/TOOLCHAIN): Go 1.26, pnpm 11, golangci-lint v2, gts, Vitest 4.
- [CI/CD](https://mise.danny.vn/#/engineering/CI-CD): Pipeline, SAST, SCA, SBOM, container scanning, signing.
- [Testing](https://mise.danny.vn/#/engineering/TESTING): Test pyramid, MCP contract tests, eval golden-set, load tests.
- [Deployment](https://mise.danny.vn/#/engineering/DEPLOYMENT): GKE runtime topology, scale-down, backup/DR.
- [Threat model](https://mise.danny.vn/#/engineering/THREAT-MODEL): Assets, trust boundaries, STRIDE, residual risks.

## Project

- [Roadmap](https://mise.danny.vn/#/project/ROADMAP): M0–M8 milestones, all complete (v0.1.0 design-doc release).
- [Decisions](https://mise.danny.vn/#/project/DECISIONS): 30 locked architectural decisions + open items.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/dannyota/mise)
